CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, data String);
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((0, 0), data) AS SipHash FROM test_table;
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((1234567890123456789, 9876543210987654321), data, toDateTime('2021-05-20 15:30:00')) AS SipHash FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((18446744073709551615, 18446744073709551615), data, '', 0) AS SipHash FROM test_table;
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((1, 2), data, 'boundary', subquery.val) AS SipHash FROM (SELECT count(*) AS val FROM test_table) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE another_table (key UInt64, value String);
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((506097522914230528, 1084818905618843912), (SELECT value FROM another_table WHERE key = 1), 'complex', 10) AS SipHash;
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((10, 20), data, 'multi', (SELECT AVG(id) FROM test_table)) AS SipHash FROM test_table;
WITH (SELECT SUM(id) FROM test_table) AS total FROM test_table SELECT sipHash64Keyed((total, 30), data) AS SipHash;
SELECT sipHash64Keyed((5000000000000000000, 6000000000000000000), arrayJoin(array('hello', 'world')), 'test', 20, toDateTime('2018-03-25 12:30:00')) AS SipHash;
